prompt: Using the provided reference image as the character base, regenerate the same classical Chinese beauty in a new vertical 9:16 portrait focused on “chess” from the four arts. Keep her pale blue-white translucent hanfu, elegant black updo, jade-and-pearl hair ornaments, dangling earrings, delicate loose hair strands, realistic skin texture, and soft oriental aesthetic consistent with the reference. Change the composition to a closer front-facing seated portrait with the upper body centered and hands relaxed near the lower edge. Replace the outdoor misty mountain-lake setting and guqin with an indoor scholarly scene: a wooden side table on the right holding a Go board with exactly two visible groups of stones, black and white, plus a small dark wooden bowl behind it. Add a subtle jade pendant necklace at her collarbone. Use a muted ink-wash wall or folding-screen background with pine and mountain silhouettes, soft diffused studio lighting, shallow depth of field, ultra-realistic 4K photographic detail, flowing sheer fabric, fine hair detail, and refined Eastern elegance. Optional customization: set the theme to Go chess / qí, the portrait orientation to 9:16 vertical, the garment color to pale blue-white, the background to indoor ink-wash wall with pine and mountains, and the accessory accent to jade pendant necklace. Avoid adding text, logos, watermarks, extra people, or modern objects.
